description_long: This is a dark wooden bench with a simple, robust design, featuring two wide horizontal planks forming the backrest and a single thick plank as the seat. The bench is supported by four sturdy rectangular legs, each made from the same dark wood as the rest of the structure. The backrest is slightly separated into two slats, providing both support and a subtle visual detail. There are no armrests, giving the bench a minimalist and functional appearance. The wood grain is visible, suggesting a natural finish with a matte sheen. This bench is well-suited for parks, sidewalks, or other outdoor urban environments.
description: A dark wooden bench with a slatted backrest and thick rectangular legs, designed for outdoor use. The bench has a minimalist, sturdy appearance with visible wood grain and no armrests.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two-slat backrest, wide seat, and sturdy legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the seat and backrest, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the slatted backrest and the full width of the supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the seat and backrest thickness, with clear leg structure.
